data.title: Solana's Seeker Phone Airdrop Concludes with High Claim Rate
data.description: Solana's second-generation phone, Seeker, has completed its first season SKR airdrop. According to Foresight News, the final claim rate reached 89.7%, with 200 million unclaimed tokens set to be included in future airdrop pools. Additionally, 70% of the circulating SKR tokens are currently staked.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Tesla's Capital Expenditure to Surge to $25 Billion as Musk Bets on AI and Robotics
data.description: Tesla has announced that its capital expenditure for this year will exceed $25 billion, surpassing market expectations. According to Jin10, despite strong first-quarter earnings and cash flow, the company faces challenges with sluggish car sales and a decline in its energy storage business. As a result, Tesla is shifting its focus towards artificial intelligence, robotics, and autonomous driving to drive future growth.

data.title: White House Economic Adviser Envisions Rate Cuts with Balance Sheet Reduction
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett has expressed the possibility of implementing interest rate cuts while simultaneously reducing the balance sheet. According to Jin10, Hassett's remarks suggest a strategic approach to monetary policy that could involve adjusting interest rates in conjunction with managing the balance sheet. This perspective highlights the administration's consideration of various economic tools to address current financial conditions.

data.title: Significant Accumulation of PEPE Tokens Observed After Eight Months
data.description:
On April 23, a notable accumulation of PEPE tokens was observed, marking a significant event in the cryptocurrency market. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the address 0x2Dc…1AA2D has amassed 800 billion PEPE tokens, valued at $3.08 million, after an eight-month hiatus.

Previously, on August 14, this address withdrew 660 billion PEPE tokens when the price was $0.0000122. Following the recent acquisition, the cost per token has decreased to approximately $0.0000074286. Despite this strategic move, the address is currently experiencing an unrealized loss of $5.094 million.

data.title: Whales Experience Significant Losses in CHIP Trading
data.description: According to Foresight News, Onchain Lens monitoring has revealed significant trading activity involving CHIP by major investors over the past 24 hours. One large investor opened a triple short position on CHIP, resulting in an unrealized loss exceeding $1.7 million. Another major investor deposited 1.9 million USDC and engaged in CHIP trading for the first time. Initially, this investor made a profit of $323,000 from a long position but subsequently faced partial liquidation on a short position, ultimately closing with a loss of over $1.26 million.

data.title: Key Pillars of U.S. Crypto Regulation in 2026: CLARITY Act, GENIUS Act, and Potential Federal Reserve Changes
data.description:
The landscape of cryptocurrency regulation in the United States is set to undergo significant changes by 2026, with three main pillars shaping the future framework. According to PANews, these pillars include the introduction of the CLARITY Act, the GENIUS Act, and potential personnel changes within the Federal Reserve.

The CLARITY Act aims to provide clear guidelines for the classification and regulation of digital assets, addressing longstanding ambiguities in the sector. This legislation is expected to offer a more structured approach to how cryptocurrencies are treated under U.S. law, potentially impacting both investors and companies operating in the crypto space.

Meanwhile, the GENIUS Act is designed to foster innovation within the blockchain and cryptocurrency industries. By encouraging technological advancements and supporting startups, this act seeks to position the United States as a leader in the global digital economy.

In addition to these legislative efforts, potential changes in the Federal Reserve's personnel could influence the direction of crypto regulation. These changes may affect the central bank's stance on digital currencies and its approach to integrating them into the broader financial system.

Together, these developments highlight a comprehensive strategy to regulate and promote the growth of the cryptocurrency sector in the United States, ensuring both innovation and consumer protection.

data.title: U.S. Military Orders Ships to Turn Around in Strait of Hormuz Operation
data.description: The U.S. Central Command has announced that a military blockade operation related to the Strait of Hormuz has resulted in orders for 31 ships to either turn around or return to port. According to NS3.AI, this operation commenced on April 14 in the waters associated with the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. Central Command also stated that the U.S. military is deploying what it describes as the most comprehensive and powerful force in history across the Middle East.

data.title: A PEPE whale has once again accumulated 800 billion PEPEs, currently showing a paper loss of $5.094 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a certain whale (0x2Dc...AA2D) has accumulated 800 billion PEPE tokens again after 8 months, worth $3.08 million. This address previously withdrew 660 billion PEPE tokens on August 14th at an average price of $0.0000122. After this latest purchase, its cost basis has decreased to approximately $0.0000074286, and it currently still has a floating loss of $5.094 million.

data.title: One user profited $34,000 by interfering with Polymarket's temperature forecasting market by heating weather sensors.
data.description: A user profited $34,000 in the Polymarket weather forecast market by interfering with weather sensors at Paris airport. Polymarket previously used data from the Météo France sensor near Paris Charles de Gaulle Airport for settlement. The user purchased temperature options at extremely low prices, far exceeding market expectations. The user then used a portable heat source to heat the sensor, causing the readings to spike dramatically in a short period and be recorded as the day's highest temperature. This behavior occurred twice, on April 6th and April 15th. Météo France has detected the anomaly and filed charges.

data.title: Polymarket Weather Market Manipulation Incident in Paris
data.description: A recent incident of market manipulation occurred in the Polymarket weather market in Paris. According to Foresight News, a man exploited a temperature sensor near the runway at Charles de Gaulle Airport, which was largely unprotected, by using a portable heating device to temporarily raise the surrounding air temperature to 22°C, significantly higher than the expected 18°C for the day. He had previously purchased this low-probability outcome at a very low price, and the market settled based on this manipulated result. The man conducted this operation on April 6 and April 15, earning approximately $34,000 in total. Météo France detected the anomaly and has filed criminal charges.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong Auto Stocks Decline as Major Brands Experience Losses
data.description: Hong Kong's automotive sector witnessed a downturn with several major brands experiencing significant losses. According to Jin10, Leapmotor (09863.HK) and Geely Automobile Holdings (00175.HK) both saw their shares drop by over 5%. Additionally, XPeng Inc. (09868.HK) shares fell nearly 5%, while BYD Company Limited (01211.HK) and Lantu Motors (07489.HK) experienced declines of over 3%. The market sentiment reflects broader challenges within the automotive industry in Hong Kong.

data.title: Liquid Capital Founder Discusses Challenges in Crypto VC and Opportunities in AI
data.description:
Liquid Capital founder Jack Yi recently shared insights on the X platform regarding the challenges faced by crypto venture capital and projects. According to ChainCatcher, Yi highlighted that a significant issue has been the allocation of funds towards developing web3 products that mirror web2, which he argues is unnecessary since web3 is fundamentally a financial industry. He noted that the most successful companies in the crypto space have been financial products, such as stablecoins, exchanges, and payment systems.

Yi also pointed out the emerging opportunities in the AI era, suggesting that large-scale funding and extensive teams are no longer essential. He believes that AI combined with finance presents new opportunities, and that talented founders with a small team of experts can build top-tier companies. This, he asserts, represents the greatest opportunity in primary investment today.

data.title: Analyst Reports on Bitcoin Trading Activity
data.description: Analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X that user @Jason60704294 has closed a profitable Bitcoin position. The $75,731.7 BTC long position shared yesterday did not execute, as the market rose shortly after the post without reaching the specified price point. The term 'closed' likely refers to subsequent trades or other executed positions, though the exact profit and position size remain undisclosed.

data.title: Indonesia Secures ¥172.1 Billion in Largest Samurai Bond Sale in Two Years
data.description: Indonesia has successfully raised ¥172.1 billion ($1.1 billion) through its largest Samurai bond sale in two years, driven by robust investor demand. Bloomberg posted on X that the strong interest in Indonesia's credit has surpassed concerns regarding budgetary pressures stemming from the ongoing Middle East conflict. The bond sale highlights Indonesia's ability to attract investment despite geopolitical tensions, reflecting confidence in its economic stability and fiscal management.

data.title: Hong Kong Stocks: Zhipu Surges Over 4% to Record High
data.description: Zhipu (02513.HK) experienced a significant increase in its stock price, rising over 4% in Hong Kong trading. According to Jin10, the stock reached a peak of 1045 HKD per share, marking a new historical high.

data.title: South Korean Employee Sentenced for Embezzling Funds for Cryptocurrency Investment
data.description: A South Korean financial employee in their 20s has been sentenced to three years in prison for embezzling company funds to invest in cryptocurrency. According to ChainCatcher, the Busan District Court found the individual guilty of transferring company money into a personal account approximately 680 times between 2021 and 2025. The total amount embezzled was around 570 million Korean won, which was used for cryptocurrency trading, overseas travel, and personal expenses. The employee also forged company deposit trust balance certificates to conceal the crime.

data.title: US stocks closed with a strong rally in the crypto sector, with Strategy (MSTR) rising over 9%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.69%, the S&P 500 rose 1.05%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 1.64%. The crypto sector saw broad gains, with Strategy (MSTR) rising 9.39%, Circle rising 8.69%, Bitmine rising 7.37%, Coinbase rising 5.25%, Solana rising 4.50%, and SharpLink rising 1.49%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Tokenized U.S. Treasurys Market Cap Surpasses $14 Billion
data.description: Tokenized U.S. Treasurys have achieved a record market capitalization exceeding $14 billion. According to NS3.AI, this milestone is based on data from Token Terminal, as reported by Cryptopolitan. A significant contributor to this growth is Franklin Templeton's BENJI on-chain money market fund, which has expanded by over 381% in the past month.

data.title: Zhipu (02513.HK) shares hit a new all-time high, accumulating a gain of nearly 800% since its listing.
data.description: Market data shows that Zhipu (02513.HK) rose in early trading and is currently up more than 5%, hitting a new all-time high. Since its listing, it has accumulated a gain of nearly 800%.
